scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -n web,desktop -c cyan,magenta "turbo run dev --filter=web" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:$(node apps/web/scripts/dev-port.cjs) && turbo run start --filter=desktop"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n web,desktop -c cyan,magenta "turbo run dev --filter=web" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:$(node apps/web/scripts/dev-port.cjs) && turbo run start --filter=desktop"
